General.Name: Largo Resources Ltd
General.Description: Largo Inc., together with its subsidiaries, produces, supplies, and sells vanadium and ilmenite products in Canada and internationally. It operates through six segments: Sales and Trading; Mine Properties; Corporate; Exploration and Evaluation Properties; Clean Energy; and Largo Physical Vanadium. The company offers vanadium pentoxide flakes and powder, vanadium trioxide powder, and ferrovanadium, as well as ilmenite concentrate; and vanadium flow battery electrolyte and technology. Its products are used in steel, aerospace, defense, chemical and catalysts, master alloys, and titanium dioxide production applications. The company was formerly known as Largo Resources Ltd. and changed its name to Largo Inc. in November 2021. Largo Inc. was incorporated in 1988 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
